entries.title: Migration Assistant import flow with WordPress WXR available as an import source.
entries.notes: Install Migration Assistant first, then WordPress Importer. Capture the source selection state where the WXR reader is visible.
entries.useCase: An operator sees WordPress WXR as an available source in the Migration Assistant import flow.

entries.title: Parsed WordPress WXR rows previewed in Migration Assistant.
entries.notes: Use a small WXR fixture with at least one post and one page to show extracted title, slug, status, date, categories, tags, and author fields.
entries.useCase: An operator previews parsed WXR posts/pages with title, slug, status, date, categories, tags, and author fields.

entries.title: Import session detail for a WordPress WXR import.
entries.notes: Migration Assistant owns the page; include this screenshot when a demo import session can be created.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews the Migration Assistant import session created for a WordPress WXR import.
